microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's enterprise recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized deployment system, standardizing end-to-end workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model across enterprise customer deployments.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months at 94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable reference architecture for continuous production-environment validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract — acting as the trusted technical partner between customer engineering and internal product teams.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring automation workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39%, increase drill capacity by 21%, and codify deployment playbooks the broader team reuses across new enterprise integrations.
microsoft_2023: Championed **enterprise adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting live technical demos and hands-on training sessions that drove active utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** in production environments.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by running **11+ structured discovery interviews** with Azure engineering teams, surfacing critical API integration gaps and translating real-world deployment friction into prioritized, actionable product requirements.

Accelerated technical onboarding and deployment velocity by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling faster self-service resolution for engineering teams during integrations.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams — building the deployment playbook that became the standard for subsequent region rollouts.

Conducted deep technical discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a prioritized roadmap to automate critical deployment paths and eliminate the operational bottlenecks blocking enterprise customer go-lives.

Engineered a **Power BI deployment dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility into automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of the highest-impact infrastructure improvements each quarter.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot fleet transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping integration dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and serving as the embedded technical partner between IT, Operations, and Engineering.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives for a cross-functional robotics engineering team, triaging and resolving **40+ high-priority production tickets** to stabilize the developer intake pipeline and unblock time-sensitive deployment milestones.

Drove **25% faster software deployment cycles** by aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders on automated CI/CD pipeline implementation — codifying the integration architecture into reusable runbooks that reduced ramp time for subsequent rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end customer scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, deploying a structured CRM workflow that standardized the sales process and improved conversion rates across the enterprise customer pipeline.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website, Google Business profile, and inbound funnel to improve lead quality and lower cost-per-close.

Delivered actionable pricing intelligence to leadership by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and restructuring cost models to improve per-job profitability across the highest-volume service lines.

tailoring_notes: 'reference architecture' woven into microsoft_ft bullet#3 and microsoft_2022 bullet#1 — mirrors Deepgram JD's call to 'codify patterns into reference architectures and playbooks'
'deployment playbook' appears in microsoft_2022 bullet#1 and microsoft_robotics bullet#3 — directly mirrors JD's 'playbooks that make each new deployment faster and easier to scale'
'trusted technical partner' used in microsoft_ft bullet#4 — echoes JD phrase 'trusted technical peer' and 'operate as a trusted technical partner to customer leadership'
'technical discovery' used in microsoft_2022 bullet#2 — mirrors JD's 'lead technical discovery and solutioning for prospects and customers'

'production-environment validation' in microsoft_ft bullet#3 and 'production tickets' in amazon_robotics bullet#2 — mirrors JD's 'production excellence' and 'monitor, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues in live deployments'
